axis_weight_rationale: Revenue scale, profitability, debt pressure and comparable disclosure.
Higher score means stronger resilience / lower concern, not higher risk severity.
Targets, operational KPIs, supply-chain sustainability and reporting maturity.
Footprint scale, geographic diversity, raw-material diversity and efficiency evidence.
Breadth, value-added products, co-product valorization and evidence depth.
CSRD/ESRS readiness, climate compliance, policy exposure and disclosure maturity.
Capex, strategy, decarbonization projects and growth-vs-restructuring balance.
